text: With the increasing ROS concentration and the accumulation of unfolded proteins an UPR is triggered in the ER. This is a defence mechanism in a cell, which starts with ER stress when there is an overload of ROS. At low level the activation of PERK in the UPR can prevent further oxidative stress. In several neurodegenerative diseases ER stress was reported. The exact mechanism and the link between ROS and UPR is not completely understood.
